note_text:
Patient: 45F presenting with poorly controlled type 1 diabetes.
Conservative management including dietary and lifestyle modification, immunomodulator therapy was attempted over approximately 16 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging workup is still pending.
Referring endocrinology physician requests authorization for insulin pump.

Patient: 29F presenting with uncontrolled type 1 diabetes.
Conservative management including disease-modifying medication was attempted over approximately 6 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with type 1 diabetes.
Referring endocrinology physician requests authorization for insulin pump.

Patient: 79F presenting with uncontrolled type 1 diabetes.
Conservative management including bracing, preventive medication trial was attempted over approximately 12 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with type 1 diabetes.
Referring endocrinology physician requests authorization for insulin pump.

Patient: 43F presenting with severe hyperparathyroidism.
Conservative management including preventive medication trial, activity modification was attempted without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with hyperparathyroidism.
Referring endocrinology physician requests authorization for parathyroidectomy.

Patient: 69F presenting with severe hyperparathyroidism.
No conservative therapy has been documented yet.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with hyperparathyroidism.
Referring endocrinology physician requests authorization for parathyroidectomy.

Patient: 33F presenting with hyperparathyroidism.
Conservative management including activity modification, bracing was attempted over approximately 16 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging workup is still pending.
Referring endocrinology physician requests authorization for parathyroidectomy.
